assessment: The Mobile-Friendly OpenSprint implementation largely meets the plan scope: breakpoint constants, responsive Navbar with scrollable phase tabs, ResizableSidebar overlay behavior with backdrop and swipe-to-close, phase layouts (Sketch, Plan, Execute, Evaluate, Deliver) with responsive grids and padding, viewport-safe modals/dropdowns/toasts, DependencyGraph ResizeObserver, and Vitest viewport tests at 375×667 and 768×1024. All 1887 tests pass. One gap: NavButton icon variant (Help, Settings) uses min-w-[36px] but the plan requires 44×44px touch targets for primary actions.

proposedTasks.title: NavButton icon touch targets to 44×44px
proposedTasks.description: Update NavButton icon variant from min-w-[36px] to min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] so Help and Settings buttons meet the plan's 44×44px minimum for primary actions.
